design_plan: rng(seed=42)->hero_media=hero-0607-2-3.mp4; AIDA: attention(hero), interest(benchmarks), desire(cache economics), action(CTA); hero math max-width=1120px ensures 2–3 lines; bento density verified via grid-auto-flow:dense; label sweep includes Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok; button contrast black/white checked.
headline: Super vs Grok — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: A fair, evidence‑based comparison of Super and Grok for people choosing a personal AI agent. Grok excels at real‑time intelligence and agentic benchmarks; Super is purpose‑built for durable computer‑use workflows with a reusable computer‑use cache that makes repeated work faster and cheaper over time.
